title: Why Delivery Apps Could Shut Down on Dec 31
description:
This New Year’s Eve, food and grocery deliveries across India may be disrupted. Delivery partners working with platforms like Swiggy, Zomato, Blinkit, Zepto, Amazon, and Flipkart have called for a nationwide strike on December 31.
The protest is being organised by the Indian Federation of App-Based Transport Workers and the Telangana Gig and Platform Workers Union.
Their demands include transparent pay, an end to sudden ID blocking, mandatory rest breaks, and rolling back unsafe 10-minute delivery targets.
Many workers say speed pressures force them to take risks on crowded roads often as the sole earners for their families.
